title: Soulangia orientalis
taxonomy: Soulangia orientalis is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. It is native to China and is commonly found in the mountainous regions. The plant is classified as an evergreen vine, known for its twining stems and showy flowers. Soulangia orientalis is closely related to other species within the Bignoniaceae family, such as the trumpet vine. The plant's classification is further refined to the genus level, where it is placed within the Soulangia genus.
